name: vtit-backend-agent
description: Project-specific agent harness for building the VTIT Spring Boot backend safely.

interface.longDescription: Guides AI agents to implement the VTIT crime-report dispatch backend using Spring Boot, PostgreSQL/PostGIS, Redis, MinIO, strict security, permission, concurrency, and review gates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the VTIT Backend Agent skill. Read the project harness and implement only the assigned backend issue.
